zh.lifeSummary: Agnes Symes於大約1560年出生在英國英格蘭多瑟特包維爾斯托可。她於1580年6月13日與George Way在英國英格蘭多瑟特普斯東可 利波迪結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1589年之後在英國英格蘭多瑟特，埋葬在英國英格蘭多瑟特普斯東可 利波迪。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Agnes Symes于大约1560年出生在英国英格兰多瑟特包維爾斯托可。她于1580年6月13日与George Way在英国英格兰多瑟特普斯東可 利波迪结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1589年之后在英国英格兰多瑟特，埋葬在英国英格兰多瑟特普斯東可 利波迪。

nameMeanings.name: Symes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Dorset and Somerset): variant of   Sims  .

variants.name: Sims
meanings: variant of Sim , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.
topographic name for one who lived or worked at the house of someone called Symme (Simon).

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: Agnes Symes was born about 1560, in Powerstock, Dorset, England, United Kingdom. She married George Way on 13 June 1580, in Poorstock Liberty, Dorset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died after 1589, in Dorset, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Poorstock Liberty, Dorset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Agnes Symes est née environ 1560, à Powerstock, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé George Way le 13 juin 1580, à Poorstock Liberty, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée après 1589, à Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Poorstock Liberty, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Agnes Symes wurde um 1560 in Powerstock, Dorset, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hat am 13. Juni 1580 in Poorstock Liberty, Dorset, England, United Kingdom George Way geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1589 in Dorset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Poorstock Liberty, Dorset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Agnes Symes è nata il circa 1560 nel Powerstock, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei sposato George Way il 13 giugno 1580, nel Poorstock Liberty, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì dopo il 1589, nel Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Poorstock Liberty, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Dorset, England: イギリスイギリスドールセト
ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Symesは約1560年にイギリスイギリスドールセトポウエルストックで生まれた。1580年6月13日にイギリスイギリスドールセトポオルストック リバートイでGeorge Wayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1589年以後にイギリスイギリスドールセトで死去し，イギリスイギリスドールセトポオルストック リバートイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Symes(은)는 대략 1560년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 파워스톡에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1580년 6월 13일 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 포르스톡 리버티에서 George Way(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1589년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 포르스톡 리버티에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Agnes Symes nasceu aproximadamente 1560, em Powerstock, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela casou-se com George Way em 13 de junho de 1580, em Poorstock Liberty, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1589, em Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Poorstock Liberty, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Agnes Symes родилась около 1560 г. в местности павэрстокк, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени George Way 13 июня 1580 г. в местности пурстокк либирти, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла после 1589 г. в местности дорсет, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности пурстокк либирти, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания.
